overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V depicting a nighttime walk along a foggy desert highway shoulder. The player character walks steadily toward distant lights while a single car passes by on the road, creating a lonely, atmospheric scene with sparse vegetation and utility poles lining the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: desert highway shoulder at night with ground fog

events.description: dark sedan enters from right side and drives past the camera position on the highway
vehicle continues driving away into the foggy distance, becoming smaller and less distinct

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the gravel shoulder beside the highway, heading toward distant lights through the fog

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving along the highway, passing the camera and continuing into the foggy distance

entered.detail: two-lane asphalt road with white painted shoulder line stretching into the distance
wooden power poles with multiple cross-arms and wires running parallel to the road
tall palm trees backlit against the dark night sky, scattered along the roadside
bright white lights glowing through ground fog, creating a hazy beacon in the distance
unpaved dirt and gravel area between the asphalt road and desert terrain

segments.scene_description: Walking along a desolate desert highway at night, surrounded by sparse palm trees and utility poles. A dark sedan drives past on the road, its taillights disappearing into the foggy distance toward the bright lights ahead. The atmosphere is quiet and isolated, with low visibility due to nighttime fog and minimal traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective along a desolate desert highway at night, moving steadily toward a distant glow through a thick, isolating fog. It begins with a slow walk beside the road, passing sparse palm trees and utility poles that fade into the hazy darkness. As the camera advances, a dark sedan drives past, its red taillights cutting through the mist before disappearing into the distance. The scene then maintains its quiet, lonely atmosphere, drawing closer to the bright lights ahead while the surrounding desert landscape remains shrouded in low visibility.
